title: Poppi Upload Manifest (v1)
description: Per-batch upload manifest. CLI sends this on POST /uploads; cloud returns it (with manifestId) and the same shape appears in the CLI's final-summary JSON on stdout. FR-036 contract surface.

manifestId.description: Cloud-assigned identifier; absent on the create request, present on the response and every subsequent reference.

cliVersion.description: semver of the CLI release that produced this manifest. Cloud uses this to enforce minimum-supported-version policies (FR-032/033).

redactionPolicyVersion.description: v<MAJOR>.<MINOR> string identifying the anonymizer ruleset under which the payload was redacted. FR-017.

sourceKind.description: Identifier of the source-adapter that produced these sessions. v1 emits only 'claude-code'. FR-008.

expectedSessionCount.description: Number of session entries the CLI intends to upload under this manifest. Set at manifest-create time; immutable thereafter. May exceed the count reported at complete-time if FR-027b skips fire.

sessionId.description: Stable per-session identifier. For Claude Code sources this is the JSONL-native sessionId (FR-006b); otherwise derived per identityDerivation.

identityDerivation.description: How sessionId was obtained. 'native' = read from the source file's own content; 'path-hash' = sha256 of canonicalized absolute path (fallback per research.md R-10).

contentHash.description: Lowercase hex sha256 of the redacted payload bytes that will be PUT to the presigned URL.

byteSize.description: Post-gzip size in bytes of the payload that will be PUT.
